global_task: Observe the object placement order, remember it, then place the corresponding objects into the basket in the same order.
subtasks: Observe the opposite robotic arm place the 1st object into the basket.
Observe the opposite robotic arm place the 2nd object into the basket.
Observe the opposite robotic arm place the 3rd object into the basket.
Observe the opposite robotic arm place the 4th object into the basket.
Observe the opposite robotic arm place the 5th object into the basket.
Pick up and place the 1st object into the basket in the same order as observed.
Pick up and place the 2nd object into the basket in the same order as observed.
Pick up and place the 3rd object into the basket in the same order as observed.
Pick up and place the 4th object into the basket in the same order as observed.
Pick up and place the 5th object into the basket in the same order as observed.
